case_title: YINGPENG XU VS. JACK WU ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: RENATL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF XU, YINGPENG
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF XU, YINGPENG SERVED SEP-23-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WU, JACK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF XU, YINGPENG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WU, JACK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 4039 19TH AVENUE, IN-LAW UNIT SAN FRANCISCO CA 94132 SAN FRANCISCO, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JUL-14-2025.
